def negative_logging_set_level_hardcoded_at_module_scope():
    rule_id = "logging_set_level_hardcoded_at_module_scope"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG) or similar hardcoded at module scope instead of via application config."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
